entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench landraces used for food and feed in Senegal

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: Country where the study on sorghum genetic diversity was conducted

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within the sorghum populations

entities.name: GENETIC STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within and among populations

entities.name: MARGINAL PRODUCTION AREAS
entities.description: Areas with suboptimal conditions for sorghum production

entities.name: THIÈS
entities.description: A region in Senegal where sorghum landraces were sampled

entities.name: DIOURBEL
entities.description: A region in Senegal where sorghum landraces were sampled

entities.name: KÉDOUGOU
entities.description: A region in Senegal where sorghum landraces were sampled

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used to analyze genetic diversity

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Alternative forms of a gene or genetic marker locus recorded during analysis

entities.name: HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: The state of having different alleles at a locus, measured in the study

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure of genetic divergence between populations

entities.name: NEIGHBOUR JOINING CLASSIFICATION MODEL
entities.description: A method used to create a dendrogram for classifying sorghum accessions

entities.name: GERMPLASM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The sustainable in situ management of genetic resources

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of accessions
